title: Wooden Shield
description: A mod that simply adds a wooden shield!
body:
A mod that adds a wooden shield. That is all! 
This mod was commissioned for me by gilbertsun827 on Fiverr, all credit goes to him! 
Here is his Fiverr link:  https://www.fiverr.com/gilbertsun827?source=inbox

This mod only adds 1 item, a wooden shield. It is a very weak shield with only 15 durability. Pictures and recipe are in the gallery section! The original idea for this mod was for the use of an early game shield, with the idea that I would use this mod in combination with a player leveling mod such as LevelZ, so this would let me use a shield early game! But like I said, to balance this it is very weak. 

You may use this mod however you like!
